articles.title_en: Medvedev pointed out the inevitability of Armenia's transition to European gas prices
articles.lead_en: If Yerevan continues its course of rapprochement with the EU, it will not be possible to remain a member of the EAEU, noted the Deputy Head of the Russian Security Council
articles.title_raw: Медведев указал на неизбежность перехода Армении на европейские цены на газ
articles.lead_raw: Если Ереван продолжит свой курс сближения с ЕС, оставаться членом ЕАЭС не получится, отметил замглавы Совбеза РФ

articles.title_en: Medvedev recommended Pashinyan to begin negotiations on supplies of American LNG
articles.lead_en: The benefits of participation in the EAEU for Armenia will disappear with a reorientation towards Europe, noted the Deputy Head of the Russian Security Council
articles.title_raw: Медведев рекомендовал Пашиняну начинать переговоры о поставках американского СПГ

articles.title_en: Ukrainian Drone Attack Sparks Fire at Russian Oil Depot
articles.lead_en: Two people were wounded in an attack on Russia's fifth largest oil export hub in Novorossiysk, the local mayor said.

articles.title_en: ‘No fuel — none at all.’ Independent gas stations in Russia face gasoline shortage after Ukrainian drone strikes on refineries
articles.lead_en: Independent gas station chains, which handle about 40% of fuel sales in Russia, can no longer restock their gasoline supplies. Chats used by oil traders and managers at those chains are “in a panic,” the independent Russian news outlet Novaya Gazeta Europe reported.
articles.title_raw: ‘No fuel — none at all.’ Independent gas stations in Russia face gasoline shortage after Ukrainian drone strikes on refineries

articles.title_en: Sevastopol Begins Rationing Gasoline Due to ‘Logistical Challenges’
articles.lead_en: The rationing measures in annexed Crimea’s largest city come as Ukrainian drone strikes against oil refineries across Russia cause a slump in fuel production.

articles.title_en: Power of Siberia 2 to reshape global natural gas flows
articles.lead_en: According to the newspaper, by receiving larger volumes of gas from Russia, China will be far less compelled to seek contracts on the global liquefied natural gas market, largely supplied by the United States after the closure of the Strait of Hormuz

articles.title_en: El Pais: "Power of Siberia - 2" will change global natural gas distribution flows
articles.lead_en: According to the newspaper, by receiving more gas from Russia, China will be much less forced to seek contracts on the global LNG market, supplied largely by the United States after the closure of the Strait of Hormuz
articles.title_raw: El Pais: "Сила Сибири - 2" изменит мировые потоки распределения природного газа
articles.lead_raw: По версии газеты, получая больше газа из России, КНР будет намного меньше вынуждена искать контракты на мировом рынке СПГ, поставляемого в значительной мере США после закрытия Ормузского пролива
